info.title: Cs2Ts
info.description:
Converts C# classes, records, structs, interfaces, and enums marked with
[ConvertToTs] into TypeScript type definitions.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show the version number
The tool scans all .cs files in the current directory (excluding bin/obj)
and generates TypeScript for types decorated with [ConvertToTs].

arguments.name: OUTPUTFOLDER
arguments.description:
Path where .ts files will be written.
Existing .ts files in this directory will be deleted.
